transcript: Speaker A (AI): तुझं नाव काय आहे? [What is your name?] Speaker B (Man): My name is Rahul. Speaker A (AI): तुझं वय काय आहे? [What is your age?] Speaker B (Man): I have 22. Speaker A (AI): I have 22 नाही. I am 22 yrs old म्हणायचं. [Not 'I have 22'. Say 'I am 22 yrs old'.] Speaker B (Man): Okay okay. I am 22 years old. Speaker A (AI): तू कुठला आहेस? [Where are you from?] Speaker B (Man): I am Maharashtra. Speaker A (AI): I am Maharashtra नाही. I am from Maharashtra म्हणायचं. [Not 'I am Maharashtra'. Say 'I am from Maharashtra'.] Speaker B (Man): Oh... ठीक आहे ठीक आहे. मला English नीट येत नाही. [Oh... okay okay. I don't know English well.] Speaker A (AI): काही problem नाही. AI teacher try केलं आहे का? [No problem. Have you tried an AI teacher?] Speaker B (Man): ते तर खूप महाग असतील ना? [But they must be very expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): अजिबात नाही. Normal English classes पेक्षा 7 पट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून 50 लाख लोक MySivi वर English practice करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B (Man): वेळ मिळत नाही. [I don't get time.] Speaker A (AI): रोज फक्त 15-20 मिनिटांची practice पुरेशी आहे. तुम्ही पूर्ण confident व्हाल. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become fully confident.] Speaker B (Man): Wow, कसं join करू? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker A (AI): Install चा button दाबा आणि MySivi app install करा. फक्त 15 दिवसांत तुम्हाला improvement दिसायला लागेल. [Press the install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days.] Outro Voiceover: आत्ताच MySivi app download करा. [Download MySivi app right now.]
on_screen_text: तुझं नाव काय आहे [What is your name?], मला English येत नाही [I don't know English], My name is Rahul, तुझं वय काय आहे [What is your age?], I have 22, I am 22 yrs old, तू कुठला आहेस [Where are you from?], I am Maharashtra, I am from Maharashtra, मला English नीट येत नाही [I don't know English well], AI teacher, 7X CHEAPER / 7 पट स्वस्त आहे [7 times cheaper], म्हणून 50 लाख [That's why 50 lakhs], फक्त 15-20 मिनिटांची [Just 15-20 minutes], confident व्हाल [will become confident], Install, फक्त 15 दिवसांत [In just 15 days], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A Marathi-speaking man interacts with an AI avatar on a giant phone in a desert setting. The AI corrects his English grammar mistakes and introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, quick way to learn English. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app for visible improvement in 15 days.
